title: aloysia scorodonioides var. detonsa
intro: Aloysia scorodonioides var. detonsa, a lesser-known variety of the Aloysia scorodonioides plant, is a flowering herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aloysia scorodonioides var. detonsa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
